commit.subject: LU-9687 kernel: kernel update RHEL6.9 [2.6.32-696.3.2.el6]
commit.message:
LU-9687 kernel: kernel update RHEL6.9 [2.6.32-696.3.2.el6]

Update RHEL6.9 kernel to 2.6.32-696.3.2.el6

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el6.9 mdsdistro=el6.9 \
  ossdistro=el6.9 mdtfilesystemtype=zfs \
  ostfilesystemtype=zfs testgroup=review-ldiskfs

Signed-off-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
Change-Id: I921277de54fbe3f8084ad15e4708a5a7d1cfd27e
